dataset: DHIS2 Sierra Leone Demo Database v2.40

pi_items.source: Task description states 'Name the rule Penta1 >= Penta3'. Verifier filters rules containing 'penta' in lowercase (line 54 of export_result.sh).

Task description states 'Add this rule to a new validation rule group named Immunization Quality Checks'. Verifier checks for both 'immunization' and 'quality' in lowercase (line 91 of export_result.sh).

Task description requires 'Penta 1 doses given must be greater than or equal to Penta 3 doses given'. Verifier checks operator == 'greater_than_or_equal_to' (line 105 of verifier.py). DHIS2 documentation confirms this is a valid operator in validation rules.

Task description explicitly states 'save the text results (list of violations or no violations found) to a file at /home/ga/Desktop/validation_results.txt'. Setup script removes any previous file at this path (line 39 of setup_task.sh). Export script checks for file existence at this location (line 102 of export_result.sh).
Task requires creating a new validation rule, adding it to a validation rule group, and running validation analysis. This is core DHIS2 data quality configuration functionality.
Setup script at line 14 of setup_dhis2.sh specifies the primary URL. DHIS2 maintains these demo databases as official resources for testing and training.
Task description provides credentials. Confirmed in setup_dhis2.sh (line 13) and task_utils.sh (line 130) where API calls use curl -u admin:district.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the official DHIS2 Sierra Leone demo database (real health data) downloaded from https://databases.dhis2.org/sierra-leone/2.40/. The rule name must contain keywords 'Penta', '1', '3' (as specified in rule 'Penta1 >= Penta3'). The validation rule group must contain keywords 'Immunization' and 'Quality' (as in group name 'Immunization Quality Checks'). The validation rule operator must be 'greater_than_or_equal_to' (>=) to check that Penta 1 doses are greater than or equal to Penta 3 doses. Results must be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/validation_results.txt. Login uses credentials admin/district. The task operates on Bo district, a real district in Sierra Leone. All metadata claims are accurate and consistent with task requirements and DHIS2 platform specifications.
